challenges.name: Health endpoint returns 200 with status ok
challenges.description: GET /api/v1/health -> HTTP 200, JSON body with status: ok

assertions.message: Health endpoint returns 200 with status ok must produce a result

challenges.name: User registration with valid data
challenges.description: POST /api/v1/auth/register with sip_username, sip_password, account_id -> HTTP 201, user object returned | POST /api/v1/auth/login with registered credentials -> HTTP 200, access token returned

assertions.message: User registration with valid data must produce a result

challenges.name: User login with invalid credentials
challenges.description: POST /api/v1/auth/login with wrong password -> HTTP 401, error message | POST /api/v1/auth/login with empty body -> HTTP 400, validation error

assertions.message: User login with invalid credentials must produce a result

challenges.name: Create chat between two users
challenges.description: Register userA and userB via API -> Both users created successfully | POST /api/v1/auth/login -> Access token obtained | POST /api/v1/chats with userB's account_id -> Chat object returned with valid ID

assertions.message: Create chat between two users must produce a result

challenges.name: Send and retrieve messages
challenges.description: POST /api/v1/messages with chat_id and message text -> Message object returned with ID | GET /api/v1/messages?chat_id=X -> Array containing the sent message

assertions.message: Send and retrieve messages must produce a result

challenges.name: Contact management flow
challenges.description: POST /api/v1/contacts with contact SIP -> Contact created | GET /api/v1/contacts -> Array with added contact | DELETE /api/v1/contacts/:id -> Contact removed

assertions.message: Contact management flow must produce a result

challenges.name: File upload and download
challenges.description: POST /api/v1/files/upload multipart with image -> HTTP 200, fileshareid returned | GET /api/v1/files/download/:fileShareId -> File binary returned with correct MIME type

assertions.message: File upload and download must produce a result

challenges.name: Profile update operations
challenges.description: PUT /api/v1/profile/presence with online status -> HTTP 200 | PUT /api/v1/profile/name -> HTTP 200 | PUT /api/v1/profile/email -> HTTP 200

assertions.message: Profile update operations must produce a result

challenges.name: Push notification token registration
challenges.description: POST /api/v1/push/register with token and platform -> HTTP 200

assertions.message: Push notification token registration must produce a result

challenges.name: Scheduled calls CRUD
challenges.description: GET /api/v1/scheduled-calls -> HTTP 200, array (may be empty) | GET /api/v1/calls/history -> HTTP 200, array (may be empty)

assertions.message: Scheduled calls CRUD must produce a result

challenges.name: Account search
challenges.description: GET /api/v1/accounts/search?q=admin -> HTTP 200, results containing admin user

assertions.message: Account search must produce a result

challenges.name: Rate limiting enforced
challenges.description: Rapidly call an endpoint 100+ times -> Eventually receives HTTP 429 or rate limit headers

assertions.message: Rate limiting enforced must produce a result

challenges.name: Unauthorized access blocked
challenges.description: GET /api/v1/users without X-Access-Token -> HTTP 401 | GET /api/v1/users with fake token -> HTTP 401

assertions.message: Unauthorized access blocked must produce a result

challenges.name: WebSocket connection and messaging
challenges.description: Connect to /api/v1/ws?userId=testuser -> WebSocket connection established | Send {type: heartbeat} message -> Connection stays alive

assertions.message: WebSocket connection and messaging must produce a result

challenges.name: Regions endpoint
challenges.description: GET /api/v1/regions -> HTTP 200, array of regions

assertions.message: Regions endpoint must produce a result

challenges.name: Admin login flow
challenges.description: Open http://localhost:3001 -> Login form renders with username/password fields | Enter admin/admin and submit -> Redirect to dashboard

assertions.message: Admin login flow must produce a result

challenges.name: Dashboard displays real statistics
challenges.description: Navigate to dashboard -> Stat cards show user count, chat count, contact count | Check Recent Activity section -> Shows real activity items from system

assertions.message: Dashboard displays real statistics must produce a result

challenges.name: User management CRUD
challenges.description: Click Users in sidebar -> User list table renders | Click Create User, fill form, submit -> User appears in list | Click user row, modify name, save -> User name updated | Click delete button on user -> User removed from list

assertions.message: User management CRUD must produce a result

challenges.name: Chat management
challenges.description: Navigate to chats page -> Chat list renders | Click create, select participants -> New chat created

assertions.message: Chat management must produce a result

challenges.name: Message monitoring
challenges.description: Navigate to messages page -> Message list renders | Use search field -> Filtered results shown

assertions.message: Message monitoring must produce a result

challenges.name: Contact administration
challenges.description: Navigate to contacts page -> Contact list renders

assertions.message: Contact administration must produce a result

challenges.name: Admin responsive layout
challenges.description: View at full resolution -> Sidebar visible, content properly laid out | Resize to tablet dimensions -> Layout adapts, no horizontal scroll | Resize to mobile dimensions -> Hamburger menu, content stacks vertically

assertions.message: Admin responsive layout must produce a result

challenges.name: Admin logout
challenges.description: Find and click logout button -> Redirect to login page, token cleared

assertions.message: Admin logout must produce a result

challenges.name: Web PWA login flow
challenges.description: Open http://localhost:3002 -> Login page renders | Enter testuser@example.com / password -> Redirect to chats

assertions.message: Web PWA login flow must produce a result

challenges.name: Chat list and navigation
challenges.description: Navigate to /chats -> Chat list renders with existing chats | Click on a chat -> Chat messages area opens

assertions.message: Chat list and navigation must produce a result

challenges.name: Send text message
challenges.description: Navigate to a chat with messages -> Message input visible | Type text and press Enter/Send -> Message appears in chat

assertions.message: Send text message must produce a result

challenges.name: Contact management
challenges.description: Navigate to /contacts -> Contact list renders | Click add, search, send request -> Contact request sent

assertions.message: Contact management must produce a result

challenges.name: Profile settings
challenges.description: Navigate to /profile -> Profile page with user info | Modify name, save -> Changes saved

assertions.message: Profile settings must produce a result

challenges.name: Web PWA responsive layout
challenges.description: View at 375x812 -> Mobile-friendly layout | View at 1920x1080 -> Full desktop layout

assertions.message: Web PWA responsive layout must produce a result

challenges.name: Desktop app login
challenges.description: Launch Electron app -> Login page renders | Enter credentials and submit -> Redirect to dashboard

assertions.message: Desktop app login must produce a result

challenges.name: Desktop dashboard
challenges.description: Navigate to dashboard -> Stats cards and activity shown

assertions.message: Desktop dashboard must produce a result

challenges.name: Desktop user management
challenges.description: Navigate to users -> User list table | Create new user -> User added

assertions.message: Desktop user management must produce a result

challenges.name: Desktop chat and messaging
challenges.description: Navigate to chats -> Chat list renders | Click a chat -> Messages displayed

assertions.message: Desktop chat and messaging must produce a result

challenges.name: Desktop contacts
challenges.description: Navigate to contacts -> Contact list renders

assertions.message: Desktop contacts must produce a result

challenges.name: Mobile app launch and login
challenges.description: Start Bear Messenger app on Android -> Login screen renders | Enter credentials -> Navigate to main screen

assertions.message: Mobile app launch and login must produce a result

challenges.name: Mobile chat list
challenges.description: Navigate to chats tab -> Chat list with scrollable content

assertions.message: Mobile chat list must produce a result

challenges.name: Mobile messaging
challenges.description: Open chat, type message, send -> Message delivered

assertions.message: Mobile messaging must produce a result

challenges.name: Mobile contacts
challenges.description: Navigate to contacts -> Contact list renders

assertions.message: Mobile contacts must produce a result

challenges.name: Mobile profile
challenges.description: Navigate to profile -> Profile form visible and editable

assertions.message: Mobile profile must produce a result

challenges.name: Two-user registration and chat
challenges.description: Register via API -> User A created | Register via API -> User B created | POST /contacts -> Contact added | POST /chats -> Chat created | Both users send messages -> Messages visible to both

assertions.message: Two-user registration and chat must produce a result

challenges.name: Media exchange between users
challenges.description: Upload image, send file share -> Image reference in message | Upload video, send file share -> Video reference in message | Both send audio -> Audio references present

assertions.message: Media exchange between users must produce a result

challenges.name: Extended conversation
challenges.description: Automated 5-minute conversation -> All messages delivered successfully | Both users fetch messages -> Counts match, content verified

assertions.message: Extended conversation must produce a result

challenges.name: API response latency under 500ms
challenges.description: Time GET /health -> Response in under 100ms | Time POST /auth/login -> Response in under 500ms

assertions.message: API response latency under 500ms must produce a result

challenges.name: Concurrent request handling
challenges.description: Parallel GET /health -> All return 200, no timeouts

assertions.message: Concurrent request handling must produce a result

challenges.name: SQL injection prevention
challenges.description: Send ' OR 1=1 -- as username -> Login fails, no SQL error | Send SQL payload in search query -> No data leak, proper error

assertions.message: SQL injection prevention must produce a result

challenges.name: XSS prevention in messages
challenges.description: Send <script>alert(1)</script> as message -> Script not executed, sanitized

assertions.message: XSS prevention in messages must produce a result

challenges.name: CORS headers present
challenges.description: OPTIONS request to API -> Access-Control headers present

assertions.message: CORS headers present must produce a result

challenges.name: Bcrypt password hashing
challenges.description: Register, then verify password is bcrypt hashed in DB -> Password starts with $2a$ or $2b$

assertions.message: Bcrypt password hashing must produce a result
